manifest.author: thenomadlad
manifest.name: Note archiver
manifest.description: Tools to archive your notes in another folder

manifest.author: Zac Bagley
manifest.name: Atomizer
manifest.description: Turn any text into insightful atomic notes.

manifest.author: MrAnyx
manifest.name: Note Batcher
manifest.description: Create all unresolvered links with a single click on your Obsidian vault

manifest.author: José Peña
manifest.name: Note Bundler
manifest.description: Export bundles of notes into a single markdown file.

manifest.author: Ming
manifest.name: Note Calendar
manifest.description: A calendar plugin that displays lunar dates, holidays, workday adjustments, solar terms, and allows updating/creating notes associated with calendar entries.

manifest.author: ZigHolding
manifest.name: Note Chain
manifest.description: File sorting and hierarchical indentation display in the File Explorer. MCP Server, easyapi, and more.

manifest.author: Ezhik
manifest.name: Note Codes
manifest.description: Reference your notes from anywhere with simple 4-character codes.

manifest.author: Chris Verbree
manifest.name: Note Companion Folder
manifest.description: Manage a separate folder of attachments for each note.

manifest.author: Lebenswille
manifest.name: Note Copilot
manifest.description: AI copilot in the right side panel

manifest.author: pangy9
manifest.name: Note Database
manifest.description: Database views for notes with table, board, gallery, formulas, filters, and inline editing.

manifest.author: Dominic Let
manifest.name: Note Definitions
manifest.description: Personal dictionary for your notes

manifest.author: mdklab
manifest.name: Note Favicon
manifest.description: Extracts a URL from the frontmatter of notes and displays an associated favicon image next to the note title in the file tree. Supports standard URLs and base64-encoded images.

manifest.name: Note Folder Autorename
manifest.description: Turn notes into folders and automaticaly move/rename their folders when they move or are renamed.

manifest.author: ArhiChief
manifest.name: Note From Form
manifest.description: Define dynamic input form and use it to create notes

manifest.author: Pash Shocky
manifest.name: Note Gallery
manifest.description: A masonry gallery view for your notes. Allows to have a birds eye view over the notes in your vault.

manifest.author: hzlume
manifest.name: Note Heatmap
manifest.description: GitHub-style note activity heatmap with periodic notes and Git diff integration.

manifest.author: wsqstar
manifest.name: Note Highlight
manifest.description: Render square-bracket planning tags such as [fact], [trap], and [next] as readable badges.

manifest.author: Dominik Mayer
manifest.name: Note ID
manifest.description: Displays notes by their ID, enabling structured sequences for manuscripts or Zettelkasten ("Folgezettel").

manifest.author: ThreeM
manifest.name: Note Illustrator
manifest.description: Generates and replaces images in your notes based on a description heading, using AI.

manifest.author: Lemon695
manifest.name: Note Image Gallery
manifest.description: Display all images from your note in a gallery view.

manifest.author: Nick Allison
manifest.name: Note Linker with Previewer
manifest.description: Link your notes together

manifest.author: PAN, YUN-HUEI
manifest.name: Note Lock
manifest.description: Password-protect individual notes with per-file idle auto-lock.

manifest.author: Felvesthe
manifest.name: Note Locker
manifest.description: Lock notes to open in preview mode by default.

manifest.author: pingzi-crypto
manifest.name: Note Loom
manifest.description: Weave free-form notes into structured notes with your own templates, fields, tables, and checklists.

manifest.author: Richard Parks
manifest.name: NoteMakerAI
manifest.description: Create structured notes from photos using AI. Analyze subjects and extract metadata automatically.

manifest.author: Andre-Diamond
manifest.name: Daily Note Metrics
manifest.description: Parses tags, emoji tags, and checkboxes in your Daily Notes to create interactive charts.

manifest.author: bueckerlars
manifest.name: Advanced Note Mover
manifest.description: Automatically move notes into folders using configurable rules — match on tags, properties, filenames, dates, and more. Supports templates, blacklist filters, preview, attachment co-move, and undo.

manifest.author: m
manifest.name: Note Navigator
manifest.description: Streamlines note review by automatically navigating to the next note upon deletion. Adds commands to go to the previous and next note, respecting user-selected sort order.

manifest.author: Sri Vadrevu
manifest.name: Note Open Tracker Plus
manifest.description: Tracks how often notes are opened and generates analytics (30/90/365 + all-time).

manifest.author: XZSt4nce
manifest.name: Note Placeholder
manifest.description: Replaces text of note link to placeholder in view mode.

manifest.author: Ryoma Kawahara
manifest.name: Note Progressbar
manifest.description: Displays a live progress bar summarizing checkbox completion in the active note.

manifest.author: Jamie Weston
manifest.name: Lookalike
manifest.description: Find similar notes based on the frequency of terms within the vault.

manifest.author: m
manifest.name: Note Reader
manifest.description: Provides text-to-speech (TTS) for notes or clipped articles by reading them aloud while highlighting words. Offers on-device and online voice providers.

manifest.author: keithwithai
manifest.name: Note Reading Progress
manifest.description: Shows remaining reading time and scroll progress for the current note in both edit and reading modes.

manifest.name: Note Refactor
manifest.description: Extract note content into new notes and split notes

manifest.author: Travis Linkey
manifest.name: Note Reviewer
manifest.description: Help knowledge retention by reviewing and filtering notes.

manifest.author: chuyuan-li
manifest.name: Note Share Image Exporter
manifest.description: Export and share notes as images or PDFs with live preview, watermarks, and split output.

manifest.author: DecafDev
manifest.name: Note Splitter
manifest.description: Split a note into individual notes based on a delimiter.

manifest.author: Aleix Soler
manifest.name: Note Status
manifest.description: Track and change note statuses across your vault with templates, bulk folder actions, dashboards, and non-Markdown support.

manifest.author: ZigHolding
manifest.name: Note Sync
manifest.description: Sync notes or plugins between vaults.

manifest.author: Songchen Tan
manifest.name: Note Synchronizer
manifest.description: This is a plugin for synchornizing Obsidian notes to other note-based softwares like Anki, following more strictly the principles of Zettelkasten and treating each Obsidian file as a note.

manifest.author: Sun Booshi
manifest.name: NoteToMP
manifest.description: Send notes to WeChat MP drafts, or copy notes to WeChat MP editor, perfect preservation of note styles, support code highlighting, line numbers in code, and support local image uploads.

manifest.author: greedyhao
manifest.name: Note to Public
manifest.description: 一键发布笔记到微信公众号等平台.

manifest.author: Yeban
manifest.name: Note to RED
manifest.description: Convert Markdown notes to RED (Xiaohongshu) style images

manifest.author: Chris Gurney
manifest.name: Note Toolbar
manifest.description: Add customizable toolbars to your notes.

manifest.author: ste
manifest.name: Note Type
manifest.description: Assign type to your notes and quickly switch between them.

manifest.author: Sébastien Dubois
manifest.name: Note Village
manifest.description: A 2D pixel art village where your notes become villagers you can explore and chat with using AI.

manifest.author: Valentin Pelletier
manifest.name: Note UID Generator
manifest.description: Automatically or manually generates Unique IDs (UUID, NanoID, ULID, or Snowflake) for notes and registers them in metadata (frontmatter).

manifest.author: david4liu
manifest.name: Knowledge AI
manifest.description: AI for your vault: grounded RAG chat with citations, hybrid (BM25 + vector + summary) retrieval, multi-format indexing (MD/PDF/DOCX/XLSX/PPTX), image OCR/Vision, and artifact generation (summaries, study guides, timelines, mind maps, slide decks).

manifest.author: ayv4zyan
manifest.name: NotebookLM Mindmap to Canvas
manifest.description: Convert NotebookLM mindmaps to Canvas with one click. Requires NotebookLM Ultra Exporter Chrome extension.
